name: @qualixar/slack-integration
description: Send messages, read channels, search history, and list channels — connect agents to team communication.

tools.name: slack_send
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user with optional thread reply, blocks, and attachments.

threadTs.description: Thread timestamp to reply in a thread

unfurlLinks.description: Enable URL unfurling in the message

username.description: Override the bot's display name for this message

tools.name: slack_read_channel
tools.description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel with optional time range and thread expansion.

channel.description: Channel name or ID to read from

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to retrieve

oldest.description: Only return messages after this Unix timestamp

latest.description: Only return messages before this Unix timestamp

tools.name: slack_search
tools.description: Search Slack messages and files across all channels the bot has access to.

query.description: Search query (supports Slack search modifiers like 'from:', 'in:', 'has:')

tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.description: List Slack channels the bot can access with member counts and topic information.

types.description: Comma-separated channel types: public_channel, private_channel, mpim, im

excludeArchived.description: Exclude archived channels from the list
